pkgmetadata.longdescription: esptool.pyA Python-based, open-source, platform-independent utility to communicate with the ROM bootloader in Espressif chips.The esptool.py project is hosted on github httpsgithub.comespressifesptool_.Documentation-------------Visit online esptool documentation httpsdocs.espressif.comprojectsesptool_ or run esptool.py -h.Contributing------------Please see the contributions guide httpsdocs.espressif.comprojectsesptoolenlatestcontributing.html_.
